name: PMG Pharmascience Co., Ltd.
summary: PMG Pharmascience Co., Ltd. primarily provides solutions for semiconductor testing equipment in South Korea. Its products include POGO socket, rubber socket, POGO tower, PI film insert, and Hi-Fix equipment, as well as COK handler/package/test socket. The company also provides semiconductor parts; develops automobile tools; and sells second-hand equipment. In addition, it offers pharmaceuticals in the areas of NSAIDs, anti-rheumatics, digestive system, and osteoporosis. The company, formerly known as AT technology Co., Ltd., was founded in 1996 and is based in Cheonan, South Korea.
